description_long: This object is a tall, slender Christmas tree with a conical shape, reminiscent of a cypress or Italian pine. The foliage is dense and textured, with a mix of dark and medium green tones, giving it a natural, realistic appearance. The trunk is short and brown, supporting the tree's height and narrow profile. There are no visible decorative ornaments, string lights, or a topper at the peak of the tree. The surface of the foliage appears rough and somewhat irregular, simulating the look of real pine needles. The tree stands upright and would be suitable for placement in urban parks, plazas, or along sidewalks as a festive decoration.
description: A tall, narrow, conical Christmas tree with dense green foliage and a short brown trunk, lacking visible decorations or a topper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tree's full height and conical shape, with dense green foliage and a visible brown trunk at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the tree's slender profile and the even distribution of foliage, with the trunk partially visible.
description_view_2: Another angled view showing the consistent conical form and dense green texture, with the trunk slightly more obscured.
description_view_3: The rear view maintains the tree's narrow, pointed silhouette and dense foliage, with the trunk visible at the base.
